subject: [RFC PATCH v4 01/27] numa: introduce N_MEMORY_PRIVATE node state

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No comments from the author yet. The thread is waiting for feedback from others.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new node state, N_MEMORY_PRIVATE, to represent memory nodes whose memory is not intended for general consumption. It adds infrastructure for private nodes, including per-node containers, callbacks, and registration API. The goal is to provide a way for device drivers to hotplug their memory without making it available for general use.
